definitions.zh: 映射规则与验证是以适配器为关键概念的本体边界；适配器上位类型、映射规范、映射规则及规则采用的匹配条件。 其成员归属遵循：当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。
definitions.en: Mapping rules and validation is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion adapter; The Adapter supertype, mapping specifications, mapping rules, and the matching conditions used by those rules. Membership follows: Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.
definitions.ja: 写像規則と検証はアダプターを主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。Adapter 上位型、写像仕様、写像規則、および規則が用いる照合条件。 所属判定は次に従います：対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 为异构模型之间的语义对应提供可复用的映射规则，并用测试、覆盖率与转换告警证明映射是否可靠。
purpose.en: Provide reusable semantic correspondences between heterogeneous models and show their reliability through tests, coverage, and conversion warnings.
purpose.ja: 異種モデル間の意味対応を再利用可能な写像規則として定義し、テスト、網羅率、変換警告によって信頼性を示します。

includes.zh: 适配器上位类型、映射规范、映射规则及规则采用的匹配条件。
includes.en: The Adapter supertype, mapping specifications, mapping rules, and the matching conditions used by those rules.
includes.ja: Adapter 上位型、写像仕様、写像規則、および規則が用いる照合条件。

includes.zh: 映射测试与执行记录、覆盖率结果、未映射项和有损转换告警。
includes.en: Mapping tests and runs, coverage results, unmapped items, and lossy-conversion warnings.
includes.ja: 写像テストと実行記録、網羅率結果、未写像項目、有損変換警告。

excludes.zh: 具体协议、框架、基准、状态图和导出格式的词汇由各自适配范围拥有；这里不复制外部类树。
excludes.en: Protocol-, framework-, benchmark-, statechart-, and export-format vocabularies belong to their respective adapter scopes; external class trees are not copied here.
excludes.ja: プロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、ステートチャート、出力形式固有の語彙は各適配範囲が所有し、外部クラス木はここに複製しません。

excludes.zh: 一次转换产生的文件或运行产物归模式导出或运行产物；它们不是映射规则的子类。
excludes.en: Files or runtime artifacts produced by one conversion belong to schema export or runtime artifacts; they are not subclasses of MappingRule.
excludes.ja: 一回の変換で生じるファイルや実行成果物はスキーマ出力または実行成果物に属し、MappingRule の下位型ではありません。

description.zh: 映射规则与验证的输入概念族为映射规则；责任交接由已接受事实 映射规则 —specifies→ 映射信息产物 (MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact) 明确给出。 共享关系在本面的职责：在输入面，该事实以 MappingRule 端点标明供适配与验证读取的规范，不把 MappingArtifact 误当成已经执行完成的产物。
description.en: The input families for Mapping rules and validation are mapping rule; the accepted facts mapping rule —specifies→ mapping artifact (MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact) make the responsibility handoff explicit. Facet-specific role of shared facts: On the input facet, this fact uses the MappingRule endpoint to identify the specification read by adaptation and validation; it does not claim that a MappingArtifact has already been produced by execution.
description.ja: 写像規則と検証の入力概念族は写像規則です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 写像規則 —specifies→ 写像情報成果物 (MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact) により明示されます。 共有関係のこの面での役割：入力面では、この事実の MappingRule 端点が適応・検証で読み取る仕様を示し、MappingArtifact が実行済み成果物であるとは主張しません。

description.zh: 映射规则与验证的输出概念族为映射信息产物；责任交接由已接受事实 映射规则 —specifies→ 映射信息产物 (MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact) 明确给出。 共享关系在本面的职责：在输出面，该事实以 MappingArtifact 端点标明规则所规定的可交付信息形态；这里表达规范交接，而非虚构一个投影执行活动。
description.en: The output families for Mapping rules and validation are mapping artifact; the accepted facts mapping rule —specifies→ mapping artifact (MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact) make the responsibility handoff explicit. Facet-specific role of shared facts: On the output facet, this fact uses the MappingArtifact endpoint to identify the deliverable information form specified by the rule; it expresses a specification handoff, not an invented projection activity.
description.ja: 写像規則と検証の出力概念族は写像情報成果物です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 写像規則 —specifies→ 写像情報成果物 (MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact) により明示されます。 共有関係のこの面での役割：出力面では、この事実の MappingArtifact 端点が規則で定められた引渡し可能な情報形態を示します。これは仕様の受け渡しであり、架空の投影実行活動ではありません。

description.zh: 映射规则与验证的失败概念族为转换警告；责任交接由已接受事实 映射测试结果 —reports→ 转换警告 (MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning) 明确给出。
description.en: The failure families for Mapping rules and validation are conversion warning; the accepted facts mapping test result —reports→ conversion warning (MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 写像規則と検証の失敗概念族は変換警告です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 写像試験結果 —reports→ 変換警告 (MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning) により明示されます。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体不负责启动恢复流程。具体适配范围应用通用规则或报告映射执行结果时，引用这里的 Adapter、MappingRule 和验证概念。
not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology does not initiate a recovery workflow. A concrete adapter scope references Adapter, MappingRule, and validation concepts here when applying a shared rule or reporting a mapping run.
not_applicable_reason.ja: このオントロジーは回復ワークフローを開始しません。具体的な適配範囲が共通規則を適用したり写像実行結果を報告したりするとき、ここで定義した Adapter、MappingRule、検証概念を参照します。

decision_note.zh: 映射规则与验证与框架映射按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Mapping rules and validation and Framework mappings are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 写像規則と検証とフレームワーク写像は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 映射规则与验证与框架映射按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Mapping rules and validation and Framework mappings are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 写像規則と検証とフレームワーク写像は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.ja: 写像規則と検証とフレームワーク写像は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

labels.zh: 给定源概念、目标概念和版本约束，哪些已接受映射规则实际适用？：正例
labels.en: Given source and target concepts plus version constraints, which accepted mapping rules actually apply?: positive case
labels.ja: 変換元概念、変換先概念、版制約が与えられたとき、どの承認済み写像規則が実際に適用されますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 映射规则、框架映射规则、映射信息产物、LangGraph 适配器 作边界比较；问题“给定源概念、目标概念和版本约束，哪些已接受映射规则实际适用？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares mapping rule, framework mapping, mapping artifact, LangGraph adapter at the ownership boundary. The question “Given source and target concepts plus version constraints, which accepted mapping rules actually apply?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 写像規則、フレームワーク写像規則、写像情報成果物、LangGraph アダプター を所有境界で比較します。質問「変換元概念、変換先概念、版制約が与えられたとき、どの承認済み写像規則が実際に適用されますか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Every returned rule matches both endpoints and every declared version constraint; no merely related rule is returned.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Every returned rule matches both endpoints and every declared version constraint; no merely related rule is returned.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Every returned rule matches both endpoints and every declared version constraint; no merely related rule is returned.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-val-zod-json-schema at JSON Schema > unrepresentable types and conversion behavior supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ adapter-mapping-infrastructure-cq-rule-applicability-v3 (adapter-mapping-infrastructure.rule-applicability), owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure and compared with adapter-frameworks. The source does not define Moonweave CQ adapter-mapping-infrastructure-cq-rule-applicability-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Select accepted MappingRule values whose source pattern, target pattern, and version constraints all match the requested mapping context." and expected assertion "Every returned rule matches both endpoints and every declared version constraint; no merely related rule is returned." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: JSON Schema > unrepresentable types and conversion behavior

labels.zh: 给定源概念、目标概念和版本约束，哪些已接受映射规则实际适用？：反例
labels.en: Given source and target concepts plus version constraints, which accepted mapping rules actually apply?: counterexample
labels.ja: 変換元概念、変換先概念、版制約が与えられたとき、どの承認済み写像規則が実際に適用されますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“给定源概念、目标概念和版本约束，哪些已接受映射规则实际适用？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Given source and target concepts plus version constraints, which accepted mapping rules actually apply?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「変換元概念、変換先概念、版制約が与えられたとき、どの承認済み写像規則が実際に適用されますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

labels.zh: 一次映射验证后，哪些必需语义没有目标对应，哪些对应被判定为有损？：正例
labels.en: After validating a mapping, which required semantics lack a target correspondence and which correspondences are lossy?: positive case
labels.ja: 写像を検証した後、必須意味のうち対応先がないものと、有損と判定された対応はどれですか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：模式投影运行 —applies→ 映射规则 (SchemaProjectionRun-applies-MappingRule)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: Schema projection run —applies→ mapping rule (SchemaProjectionRun-applies-MappingRule).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：スキーマ投影実行 —applies→ 写像規則 (SchemaProjectionRun-applies-MappingRule)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：The uncovered set equals the required-but-unmapped set, and each lossy item is backed by a warning tied to the tested rule.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: The uncovered set equals the required-but-unmapped set, and each lossy item is backed by a warning tied to the tested rule.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：The uncovered set equals the required-but-unmapped set, and each lossy item is backed by a warning tied to the tested rule.

labels.zh: 每个具体适配器能否沿分类骨架回到 Adapter，而不会把规则、执行记录或报告误当成适配器？：正例
labels.en: Can every concrete adapter reach Adapter through specialization without classifying rules, runs, or reports as adapters?: positive case
labels.ja: 各具体アダプターは、規則、実行記録、報告をアダプターと誤分類せず、特殊化経路で Adapter に到達できますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 映射规则、互操作适配器、映射信息产物、协议映射规则 作边界比较；问题“每个具体适配器能否沿分类骨架回到 Adapter，而不会把规则、执行记录或报告误当成适配器？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares mapping rule, interoperability adapter, mapping artifact, protocol mapping at the ownership boundary. The question “Can every concrete adapter reach Adapter through specialization without classifying rules, runs, or reports as adapters?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 写像規則、相互運用アダプター、写像情報成果物、プロトコル写像規則 を所有境界で比較します。質問「各具体アダプターは、規則、実行記録、報告をアダプターと誤分類せず、特殊化経路で Adapter に到達できますか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Each concrete adapter reaches Adapter exactly once; rules, test results, and coverage reports do not appear in that specialization set.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Each concrete adapter reaches Adapter exactly once; rules, test results, and coverage reports do not appear in that specialization set.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Each concrete adapter reaches Adapter exactly once; rules, test results, and coverage reports do not appear in that specialization set.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

labels.zh: 每个具体适配器能否沿分类骨架回到 Adapter，而不会把规则、执行记录或报告误当成适配器？：反例
labels.en: Can every concrete adapter reach Adapter through specialization without classifying rules, runs, or reports as adapters?: counterexample
labels.ja: 各具体アダプターは、規則、実行記録、報告をアダプターと誤分類せず、特殊化経路で Adapter に到達できますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“每个具体适配器能否沿分类骨架回到 Adapter，而不会把规则、执行记录或报告误当成适配器？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Can every concrete adapter reach Adapter through specialization without classifying rules, runs, or reports as adapters?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「各具体アダプターは、規則、実行記録、報告をアダプターと誤分類せず、特殊化経路で Adapter に到達できますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

competency_questions.expected_assertion: Every returned rule matches both endpoints and every declared version constraint; no merely related rule is returned.

questions.en: After validating a mapping, which required semantics lack a target correspondence and which correspondences are lossy?

competency_questions.expected_assertion: The uncovered set equals the required-but-unmapped set, and each lossy item is backed by a warning tied to the tested rule.

owns_when.zh: 当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。
owns_when.en: Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.
owns_when.ja: 対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 具体适配范围应用通用规则或报告映射执行结果时，引用这里的 Adapter、MappingRule 和验证概念。
references_when.en: A concrete adapter scope references Adapter, MappingRule, and validation concepts here when applying a shared rule or reporting a mapping run.
references_when.ja: 具体的な適配範囲が共通規則を適用したり写像実行結果を報告したりするとき、ここで定義した Adapter、MappingRule、検証概念を参照します。

rationale.zh: 通用映射规则的身份不依赖某一框架；框架映射只选择并约束这些规则来解释特定框架构造。 本条仅记录 FrameworkAdapter、FrameworkMapping；其 canonical owner 是框架映射（adapter-frameworks），因此 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 在此引用这些概念。
rationale.en: A generic mapping rule is identifiable without any one framework; framework mappings select and constrain such rules for framework-specific constructs. This record is limited to FrameworkAdapter, FrameworkMapping; their canonical owner is Framework mappings (adapter-frameworks), so adapter-mapping-infrastructure references these concepts here.
rationale.ja: 共通写像規則の同一性は特定フレームワークに依存せず、フレームワーク写像は固有構造を説明するために規則を選択して制約します。 この記録は FrameworkAdapter、FrameworkMapping だけを対象とし、canonical owner はフレームワーク写像（adapter-frameworks）です。したがって adapter-mapping-infrastructure はここでこれらを参照します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-val-zod-json-schema at JSON Schema > unrepresentable types and conversion behavior supports operational notions used to compare adapter-mapping-infrastructure with adapter-frameworks, including FrameworkAdapter, FrameworkMapping. The source does not define Moonweave Modules adapter-mapping-infrastructure or adapter-frameworks, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under adapter-mapping-infrastructure's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If removing the framework name and version leaves a complete source, target, and validation condition, the rule is generic; otherwise it belongs to framework mappings."; result=references and owner=adapter-frameworks are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: JSON Schema > unrepresentable types and conversion behavior

semantic_area.zh: 映射机制与协议专用对应
semantic_area.ja: 写像機構とプロトコル固有対応

overlap_reason.zh: 协议适配使用通用规则和测试，但协议参与者、消息行为和版本兼容区间只在协议语境中有意义。 本条仅记录 MappingArtifact、MappingRule；其 canonical owner 是映射规则与验证（adapter-mapping-infrastructure），因此 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Protocol adapters use generic rules and tests, but protocol participants, message behavior, and version compatibility ranges have meaning only in a protocol context. This record is limited to MappingArtifact, MappingRule; their canonical owner is Mapping rules and validation (adapter-mapping-infrastructure), so adapter-mapping-infrastructure owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: プロトコル adapter は汎用規則と試験を使いますが、参加者、message 動作、版互換範囲はプロトコル文脈でのみ意味を持ちます。 この記録は MappingArtifact、MappingRule だけを対象とし、canonical owner は写像規則と検証（adapter-mapping-infrastructure）です。したがって adapter-mapping-infrastructure はここでこれらを所有します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 不指定协议名称仍可复用的规则、运行或报告归映射基础设施；必须指定 MCP、A2A 等协议版本才能识别的对应归协议映射。

overlap_reason.zh: 协议适配使用通用规则和测试，但协议参与者、消息行为和版本兼容区间只在协议语境中有意义。 本条仅记录 InteroperabilityAdapter、ProtocolMapping；其 canonical owner 是协议映射（adapter-protocols），因此 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Protocol adapters use generic rules and tests, but protocol participants, message behavior, and version compatibility ranges have meaning only in a protocol context. This record is limited to InteroperabilityAdapter, ProtocolMapping; their canonical owner is Protocol mappings (adapter-protocols), so adapter-mapping-infrastructure references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: プロトコル adapter は汎用規則と試験を使いますが、参加者、message 動作、版互換範囲はプロトコル文脈でのみ意味を持ちます。 この記録は InteroperabilityAdapter、ProtocolMapping だけを対象とし、canonical owner はプロトコル写像（adapter-protocols）です。したがって adapter-mapping-infrastructure はここでこれらを参照します。

short_definitions.zh: 作为能力，适配器由这一事实区分：它是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份。
short_definitions.en: Adapter belongs to the capability category and differs from broader members in that it is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement.
short_definitions.ja: アダプターは能力として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。

definitions.zh: 作为能力，适配器由这一事实区分：它是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份。
definitions.en: Adapter belongs to the capability category and differs from broader members in that it is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity.
definitions.ja: アダプターは能力として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。 外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません。

why_needed.zh: 适配器为canonical 事实 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）提供明确端点并保持与 MappingRule 的定义边界；节点字段 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: adapter provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact MappingRule-governs-Adapter (MappingRule governs Adapter) while preserving its reviewed boundary from MappingRule; node fields adapter_id, adapter_version, scope make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: アダプターはcanonical 事実 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）の明確な端点を提供し、MappingRule との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的适配器：作为能力，适配器由这一事实区分：它是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份。；该种差可由字段 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope 检验。
includes.en: Includes adapter records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Adapter belongs to the capability category and differs from broader members in that it is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity. The differentia can be checked through fields adapter_id, adapter_version, scope.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすアダプターを含みます：アダプターは能力として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。 外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません。 種差は項目 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 映射规则只是关系 MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的另一端；相关联不表示它是适配器。
excludes.en: MappingRule is only the other endpoint of MappingRule-governs-Adapter; relatedness does not make it a Adapter.
excludes.ja: MappingRule は MappingRule-governs-Adapter のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで Adapter にはなりません。

definitions.zh: 标识适配器所面向的协议、框架、基准或导出构造族。
definitions.en: Identifies the protocol, framework, benchmark, or export construct family addressed by an Adapter.
definitions.ja: アダプタが対象とするプロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、またはエクスポート構成のファミリを識別します。

labels.ja: A2A アダプタファミリ

definitions.en: enumerates the A2A adapter family for remote agent identity, task lifecycle, message exchange, artifact exchange, opacity boundaries, and delegation metadata mappings.
definitions.zh: A2A 适配器族枚举远程智能体身份、任务生命周期、消息交换、产物交换、不透明执行边界以及委派元数据的映射系列。
definitions.ja: A2A アダプタファミリは、遠隔エージェント識別、タスクライフサイクル、メッセージ交換、成果物交換、不透明な実行境界、委任メタデータに関する写像系列を列挙します。

labels.ja: MCP アダプタファミリ

definitions.en: enumerates the MCP adapter family for tool, resource, prompt, discovery, authorization, elicitation, JSON-RPC message, and client-server capability exchange mappings.

descriptions.zh: 在一次外部框架或协议的集成构建中，系统将适配器（Adapter）记录为 MappingRule governs Adapter 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“作为能力，适配器由这一事实区分：它是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份”。记录同时写入经审查字段 adapter_id="adapter-a2a", adapter_version="2.0.0", scope=["task","message","trust"], status="supported"。
descriptions.en: During an integration build for an external framework or protocol, the system records adapter (Adapter) as the target of MappingRule governs Adapter. Its reviewed definition is “Adapter belongs to the capability category and differs from broader members in that it is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity”. The record also binds reviewed fields adapter_id="adapter-a2a", adapter_version="2.0.0", scope=["task","message","trust"], status="supported".
descriptions.ja: 外部フレームワークまたはプロトコルの統合ビルドでは、システムはアダプター（Adapter）を MappingRule governs Adapter の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「アダプターは能力として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。 外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません」です。記録には審査済み項目 adapter_id="adapter-a2a", adapter_version="2.0.0", scope=["task","message","trust"], status="supported" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 Adapter 以及方向保持不变的事实 MappingRule-governs-Adapter。
expected_result.en: The run can query Adapter together with direction-preserving fact MappingRule-governs-Adapter.
expected_result.ja: この実行では Adapter と方向を保持した事実 MappingRule-governs-Adapter を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of MappingRule-governs-Adapter, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、MappingRule-governs-Adapter の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: MappingRule 用作Adapter的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 MappingRule 的已审查定义是“映射规则是一种规范；其区分条件是：它是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明。”。不能因 relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter 而把它归入Adapter。
descriptions.en: MappingRule is the boundary contrast for Adapter. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but MappingRule's reviewed definition is “As a specification, Mapping rule is distinguished by the fact that it is a directional mapping artifact that records how an external construct maps to a canonical term or how a canonical term projects to an external construct, including source, version, scope, and loss notes.”. relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter does not make it a Adapter.
descriptions.ja: MappingRule は Adapter の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、MappingRule の審査済み定義は「仕様に属する写像規則は、次の事実を種差とします：それは方向を持つアダプタ成果物で、外部構成が標準用語へ写像される方法、または標準用語が外部構成へ投影される方法を、出典、版、範囲、損失メモとともに記録します。」です。relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter だけで Adapter にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: MappingRule 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Adapter。
expected_result.en: MappingRule retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Adapter from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: MappingRule は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Adapter へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of MappingRule-governs-Adapter; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、MappingRule-governs-Adapter の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 Adapter（适配器）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms Adapter (adapter) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は Adapter（アダプター）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 Adapter 的 semantic kind 为 capability，主父或骨架为 reviewed root module-key-root，并满足“semantic kind=capability；backbone=root_status=module-key-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Adapter has semantic kind capability, primary parent or backbone reviewed root module-key-root, and invariants “semantic kind=capability; backbone=root_status=module-key-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は Adapter の semantic kind が capability、主親または骨格が reviewed root module-key-root であり、「semantic kind=capability、backbone=root_status=module-key-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: Adapter 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for Adapter were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: Adapter の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 适配器已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: adapter was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: アダプターは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。
short_definitions.en: As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.
short_definitions.ja: 写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。

definitions.zh: 转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。
definitions.en: As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.
definitions.ja: 写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。

why_needed.zh: 转换警告为canonical 事实 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter）提供明确端点并保持与 CoverageReport 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: conversion warning provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter (ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter) while preserving its reviewed boundary from CoverageReport.
why_needed.ja: 変換警告はcanonical 事実 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter）の明確な端点を提供し、CoverageReport との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的转换警告：转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。；该种差可由关系 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes conversion warning records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす変換警告を含みます：写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。 種差は関係 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 映射覆盖报告虽与本概念同属 MappingArtifact，但其定义为“映射覆盖报告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果。”，不得替代转换警告。
excludes.en: CoverageReport shares parent MappingArtifact, but its reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Mapping coverage report is distinguished by the fact that it is a CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results.”; it must not be substituted for ConversionWarning.
excludes.ja: CoverageReport は同じ上位 MappingArtifact を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する写像網羅率報告は、次の事実を種差とします：CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません。」であり、ConversionWarning の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次外部框架或协议的集成构建中，系统将转换警告（ConversionWarning）记录为 ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter 的源端点。其已审查定义是“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件”。
descriptions.en: During an integration build for an external framework or protocol, the system records conversion warning (ConversionWarning) as the source of ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter. Its reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion”.
descriptions.ja: 外部フレームワークまたはプロトコルの統合ビルドでは、システムは変換警告（ConversionWarning）を ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 ConversionWarning 以及方向保持不变的事实 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter。
expected_result.en: The run can query ConversionWarning together with direction-preserving fact ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter.
expected_result.ja: この実行では ConversionWarning と方向を保持した事実 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: CoverageReport 用作ConversionWarning的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 CoverageReport 的已审查定义是“映射覆盖报告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果。”。不能因 shared parent MappingArtifact 而把它归入ConversionWarning。
descriptions.en: CoverageReport is the boundary contrast for ConversionWarning. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but CoverageReport's reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Mapping coverage report is distinguished by the fact that it is a CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results.”. shared parent MappingArtifact does not make it a ConversionWarning.
descriptions.ja: CoverageReport は ConversionWarning の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、CoverageReport の審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する写像網羅率報告は、次の事実を種差とします：CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません。」です。shared parent MappingArtifact だけで ConversionWarning にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: CoverageReport 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 ConversionWarning。
expected_result.en: CoverageReport retains its own type; validation must not promote it to ConversionWarning from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: CoverageReport は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで ConversionWarning へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ConversionWarning（转换警告）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ConversionWarning (conversion warning) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ConversionWarning（変換警告）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ConversionWarning 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms ConversionWarning has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は ConversionWarning の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 MappingArtifact：ConversionWarning（semantic kind=information，骨架 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact）；CoverageReport（semantic kind=information，骨架 CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact）。双端条件：ConversionWarning 条件：“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件”；CoverageReport 条件：“映射覆盖报告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent MappingArtifact: ConversionWarning (semantic kind=information, backbone ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact); CoverageReport (semantic kind=information, backbone CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact). Endpoint conditions: ConversionWarning condition: “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion”; CoverageReport condition: “As a mapping artifact, Mapping coverage report is distinguished by the fact that it is a CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 MappingArtifact：ConversionWarning（semantic kind=information、バックボーン ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact）；CoverageReport（semantic kind=information、バックボーン CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact）。両端条件：ConversionWarning の条件：「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します」；CoverageReport の条件：「写像情報成果物に属する写像網羅率報告は、次の事実を種差とします：CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

why_needed.en: mapping coverage report provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule (CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ConversionWarning.
why_needed.ja: 写像網羅率報告はcanonical 事実 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule（CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule）の明確な端点を提供し、ConversionWarning との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的映射覆盖报告：映射覆盖报告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果。；该种差可由关系 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes mapping coverage report records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a mapping artifact, Mapping coverage report is distinguished by the fact that it is a CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす写像網羅率報告を含みます：写像情報成果物に属する写像網羅率報告は、次の事実を種差とします：CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません。 種差は関係 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 转换警告虽与本概念同属 MappingArtifact，但其定义为“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。”，不得替代映射覆盖报告。
excludes.en: ConversionWarning shares parent MappingArtifact, but its reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.”; it must not be substituted for CoverageReport.
excludes.ja: ConversionWarning は同じ上位 MappingArtifact を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。」であり、CoverageReport の代用にはできません。

labels.en: Positive example of mapping coverage report
labels.ja: 写像網羅率報告の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次外部框架或协议的集成构建中，系统将映射覆盖报告（CoverageReport）记录为 CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule 的源端点。其已审查定义是“映射覆盖报告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果”。
descriptions.en: During an integration build for an external framework or protocol, the system records mapping coverage report (CoverageReport) as the source of CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule. Its reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Mapping coverage report is distinguished by the fact that it is a CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results”.
descriptions.ja: 外部フレームワークまたはプロトコルの統合ビルドでは、システムは写像網羅率報告（CoverageReport）を CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する写像網羅率報告は、次の事実を種差とします：CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 CoverageReport 以及方向保持不变的事实 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule。
expected_result.en: The run can query CoverageReport together with direction-preserving fact CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule.
expected_result.ja: この実行では CoverageReport と方向を保持した事実 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.en: Boundary case for mapping coverage report
labels.ja: 写像網羅率報告の境界例

descriptions.zh: ConversionWarning 用作CoverageReport的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ConversionWarning 的已审查定义是“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。”。不能因 shared parent MappingArtifact 而把它归入CoverageReport。
descriptions.en: ConversionWarning is the boundary contrast for CoverageReport. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ConversionWarning's reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.”. shared parent MappingArtifact does not make it a CoverageReport.
descriptions.ja: ConversionWarning は CoverageReport の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ConversionWarning の審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。」です。shared parent MappingArtifact だけで CoverageReport にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ConversionWarning 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 CoverageReport。
expected_result.en: ConversionWarning retains its own type; validation must not promote it to CoverageReport from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ConversionWarning は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで CoverageReport へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 CoverageReport（映射覆盖报告）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms CoverageReport (mapping coverage report) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は CoverageReport（写像網羅率報告）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 CoverageReport 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms CoverageReport has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は CoverageReport の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: CoverageReport 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for CoverageReport were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: CoverageReport の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 映射覆盖报告已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: mapping coverage report was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 写像網羅率報告は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 MappingArtifact：CoverageReport（semantic kind=information，骨架 CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact）；MappingTestResult（semantic kind=information，骨架 MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact）。双端条件：CoverageReport 条件：“映射覆盖报告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果”；MappingTestResult 条件：“映射测试结果是以如下事实为区分特征的映射信息产物：它是一种 MappingArtifact，记录被测规则、源/目标版本、测试输入、预期与实际输出、exact/lossy/unsupported 分类、往返比较、通过状态、执行时间和证据；它验证规则而不是替代规则”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent MappingArtifact: CoverageReport (semantic kind=information, backbone CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact); MappingTestResult (semantic kind=information, backbone MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact). Endpoint conditions: CoverageReport condition: “As a mapping artifact, Mapping coverage report is distinguished by the fact that it is a CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version”; MappingTestResult condition: “Mapping test result is a mapping artifact; its differentiating condition is that it is a MappingArtifact recording the tested rule, source and target versions, test input, expected and actual output, exact/lossy/unsupported classification, round-trip comparison, pass status, execution time, and evidence”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 MappingArtifact：CoverageReport（semantic kind=information、バックボーン CoverageReport-is_a-MappingArtifact）；MappingTestResult（semantic kind=information、バックボーン MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact）。両端条件：CoverageReport の条件：「写像情報成果物に属する写像網羅率報告は、次の事実を種差とします：CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません」；MappingTestResult の条件：「写像試験結果は写像情報成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：MappingTestResult は被試験規則・出典／対象版・入力・期待／実出力・exact/lossy/unsupported 分類・往復比較・合否・実行時刻・証拠を記録する MappingArtifact で、規則を検証し代替しません」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

short_definitions.zh: 映射信息产物属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是带标识、版本、作者或生成方、适用映射和证据来源的信息对象，包括方向映射规则、转换警告、映射测试结果和覆盖报告；它们可以附着在 Adapter 节点详情中，但仍保留自身身份和来源，不形成第二张图。
short_definitions.en: Mapping artifact is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an information object with identifier, version, author or producer, applicable mapping, and evidence provenance.
short_definitions.ja: 写像情報成果物は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：MappingArtifact は識別子・版・作成者／生成者・適用写像・証拠来歴を持つ情報で、方向付き写像規則・変換警告・写像試験結果・網羅率報告を含みます。

definitions.zh: 映射信息产物属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是带标识、版本、作者或生成方、适用映射和证据来源的信息对象，包括方向映射规则、转换警告、映射测试结果和覆盖报告；它们可以附着在 Adapter 节点详情中，但仍保留自身身份和来源，不形成第二张图。
definitions.en: Mapping artifact is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an information object with identifier, version, author or producer, applicable mapping, and evidence provenance. It includes directional mapping rules, conversion warnings, mapping-test results, and coverage reports. These artifacts may appear in Adapter node details while retaining their own identity and provenance and do not form a second graph.
definitions.ja: 写像情報成果物は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：MappingArtifact は識別子・版・作成者／生成者・適用写像・証拠来歴を持つ情報で、方向付き写像規則・変換警告・写像試験結果・網羅率報告を含みます。 Adapter ノード詳細へ内蔵表示しても自己の識別・来歴を保持し、第二のグラフを形成しません。

why_needed.zh: 映射信息产物为canonical 事实 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact（MappingRule specifies MappingArtifact）提供明确端点并保持与 MappingRule 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: mapping artifact provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact (MappingRule specifies MappingArtifact) while preserving its reviewed boundary from MappingRule.
why_needed.ja: 写像情報成果物はcanonical 事実 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact（MappingRule specifies MappingArtifact）の明確な端点を提供し、MappingRule との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的映射信息产物：映射信息产物属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是带标识、版本、作者或生成方、适用映射和证据来源的信息对象，包括方向映射规则、转换警告、映射测试结果和覆盖报告；它们可以附着在 Adapter 节点详情中，但仍保留自身身份和来源，不形成第二张图。；该种差可由关系 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes mapping artifact records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Mapping artifact is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an information object with identifier, version, author or producer, applicable mapping, and evidence provenance. It includes directional mapping rules, conversion warnings, mapping-test results, and coverage reports. These artifacts may appear in Adapter node details while retaining their own identity and provenance and do not form a second graph. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす写像情報成果物を含みます：写像情報成果物は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：MappingArtifact は識別子・版・作成者／生成者・適用写像・証拠来歴を持つ情報で、方向付き写像規則・変換警告・写像試験結果・網羅率報告を含みます。 Adapter ノード詳細へ内蔵表示しても自己の識別・来歴を保持し、第二のグラフを形成しません。 種差は関係 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 映射规则只是关系 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact 的另一端；相关联不表示它是映射信息产物。
excludes.en: MappingRule is only the other endpoint of MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact; relatedness does not make it a MappingArtifact.
excludes.ja: MappingRule は MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで MappingArtifact にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次外部框架或协议的集成构建中，系统将映射信息产物（MappingArtifact）记录为 MappingRule specifies MappingArtifact 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“映射信息产物属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是带标识、版本、作者或生成方、适用映射和证据来源的信息对象，包括方向映射规则、转换警告、映射测试结果和覆盖报告；它们可以附着在 Adapter 节点详情中，但仍保留自身身份和来源，不形成第二张图”。
descriptions.en: During an integration build for an external framework or protocol, the system records mapping artifact (MappingArtifact) as the target of MappingRule specifies MappingArtifact. Its reviewed definition is “Mapping artifact is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an information object with identifier, version, author or producer, applicable mapping, and evidence provenance. It includes directional mapping rules, conversion warnings, mapping-test results, and coverage reports. These artifacts may appear in Adapter node details while retaining their own identity and provenance and do not form a second graph”.
descriptions.ja: 外部フレームワークまたはプロトコルの統合ビルドでは、システムは写像情報成果物（MappingArtifact）を MappingRule specifies MappingArtifact の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：MappingArtifact は識別子・版・作成者／生成者・適用写像・証拠来歴を持つ情報で、方向付き写像規則・変換警告・写像試験結果・網羅率報告を含みます。 Adapter ノード詳細へ内蔵表示しても自己の識別・来歴を保持し、第二のグラフを形成しません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 MappingArtifact 以及方向保持不变的事实 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact。
expected_result.en: The run can query MappingArtifact together with direction-preserving fact MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact.
expected_result.ja: この実行では MappingArtifact と方向を保持した事実 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact を共に照会できます。

descriptions.zh: MappingRule 用作MappingArtifact的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 MappingRule 的已审查定义是“映射规则是一种规范；其区分条件是：它是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明。”。不能因 relation MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact 而把它归入MappingArtifact。
descriptions.en: MappingRule is the boundary contrast for MappingArtifact. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but MappingRule's reviewed definition is “As a specification, Mapping rule is distinguished by the fact that it is a directional mapping artifact that records how an external construct maps to a canonical term or how a canonical term projects to an external construct, including source, version, scope, and loss notes.”. relation MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact does not make it a MappingArtifact.
descriptions.ja: MappingRule は MappingArtifact の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、MappingRule の審査済み定義は「仕様に属する写像規則は、次の事実を種差とします：それは方向を持つアダプタ成果物で、外部構成が標準用語へ写像される方法、または標準用語が外部構成へ投影される方法を、出典、版、範囲、損失メモとともに記録します。」です。relation MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact だけで MappingArtifact にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: MappingRule 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 MappingArtifact。
expected_result.en: MappingRule retains its own type; validation must not promote it to MappingArtifact from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: MappingRule は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで MappingArtifact へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 MappingArtifact（映射信息产物）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms MappingArtifact (mapping artifact) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は MappingArtifact（写像情報成果物）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 MappingArtifact 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms MappingArtifact has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は MappingArtifact の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=MappingRule-specifies-MappingArtifact、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: MappingArtifact 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for MappingArtifact were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: MappingArtifact の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 映射信息产物已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: mapping artifact was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 写像情報成果物は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 映射规则是一种规范；其区分条件是：它是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明。
short_definitions.en: As a specification, Mapping rule is distinguished by the fact that it is a directional mapping artifact that records how an external construct maps to a canonical term or how a canonical term projects to an external construct, including source, version, scope, and loss notes.
short_definitions.ja: 仕様に属する写像規則は、次の事実を種差とします：それは方向を持つアダプタ成果物で、外部構成が標準用語へ写像される方法、または標準用語が外部構成へ投影される方法を、出典、版、範囲、損失メモとともに記録します。

definitions.zh: 映射规则是一种规范；其区分条件是：它是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明。

why_needed.zh: 映射规则为canonical 事实 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）提供明确端点并保持与 Adapter 的定义边界；节点字段 mapping_rule_id、version、source_construct 使该区别可验证。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的映射规则：映射规则是一种规范；其区分条件是：它是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明。；该种差可由字段 mapping_rule_id、version、source_construct 检验。
includes.en: Includes mapping rule records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a specification, Mapping rule is distinguished by the fact that it is a directional mapping artifact that records how an external construct maps to a canonical term or how a canonical term projects to an external construct, including source, version, scope, and loss notes. The differentia can be checked through fields mapping_rule_id, version, source_construct.

descriptions.zh: 在一次外部框架或协议的集成构建中，系统将映射规则（MappingRule）记录为 MappingRule governs Adapter 的源端点。其已审查定义是“映射规则是一种规范；其区分条件是：它是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明”。记录同时写入经审查字段 mapping_rule_id="mapping-rule-a2a-task", version="3", source_construct="a2a:Task", target_construct="moonweave:Task", direction="source-to-target", mapping_kind="exact", valid_from="2026-07-13T06:00:00.000Z"。
descriptions.en: During an integration build for an external framework or protocol, the system records mapping rule (MappingRule) as the source of MappingRule governs Adapter. Its reviewed definition is “As a specification, Mapping rule is distinguished by the fact that it is a directional mapping artifact that records how an external construct maps to a canonical term or how a canonical term projects to an external construct, including source, version, scope, and loss notes”. The record also binds reviewed fields mapping_rule_id="mapping-rule-a2a-task", version="3", source_construct="a2a:Task", target_construct="moonweave:Task", direction="source-to-target", mapping_kind="exact", valid_from="2026-07-13T06:00:00.000Z".
descriptions.ja: 外部フレームワークまたはプロトコルの統合ビルドでは、システムは写像規則（MappingRule）を MappingRule governs Adapter の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「仕様に属する写像規則は、次の事実を種差とします：それは方向を持つアダプタ成果物で、外部構成が標準用語へ写像される方法、または標準用語が外部構成へ投影される方法を、出典、版、範囲、損失メモとともに記録します」です。記録には審査済み項目 mapping_rule_id="mapping-rule-a2a-task", version="3", source_construct="a2a:Task", target_construct="moonweave:Task", direction="source-to-target", mapping_kind="exact", valid_from="2026-07-13T06:00:00.000Z" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 MappingRule 以及方向保持不变的事实 MappingRule-governs-Adapter。
expected_result.en: The run can query MappingRule together with direction-preserving fact MappingRule-governs-Adapter.
expected_result.ja: この実行では MappingRule と方向を保持した事実 MappingRule-governs-Adapter を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of MappingRule-governs-Adapter, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、MappingRule-governs-Adapter の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: Adapter 用作MappingRule的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 Adapter 的已审查定义是“作为能力，适配器由这一事实区分：它是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份。”。不能因 relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter 而把它归入MappingRule。
descriptions.en: Adapter is the boundary contrast for MappingRule. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but Adapter's reviewed definition is “Adapter belongs to the capability category and differs from broader members in that it is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity.”. relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter does not make it a MappingRule.
descriptions.ja: Adapter は MappingRule の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、Adapter の審査済み定義は「アダプターは能力として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。 外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません。」です。relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter だけで MappingRule にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: Adapter 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 MappingRule。
expected_result.en: Adapter retains its own type; validation must not promote it to MappingRule from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: Adapter は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで MappingRule へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of MappingRule-governs-Adapter; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、MappingRule-governs-Adapter の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

descriptions.zh: 该合成记录逐项使用映射规则节点内“结构与约束”字段中可用的非空样例值，用于验证信息附着于节点而不生成实例图。
descriptions.en: This synthetic record uses every available non-null field example from the mapping rule node's structure contract to validate inline information without creating an instance graph.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 MappingRule（映射规则）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms MappingRule (mapping rule) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は MappingRule（写像規則）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 MappingRule 的 semantic kind 为 specification，主父或骨架为 MappingRule-governs-Adapter，并满足“semantic kind=specification；backbone=MappingRule-governs-Adapter；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms MappingRule has semantic kind specification, primary parent or backbone MappingRule-governs-Adapter, and invariants “semantic kind=specification; backbone=MappingRule-governs-Adapter; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は MappingRule の semantic kind が specification、主親または骨格が MappingRule-governs-Adapter であり、「semantic kind=specification、backbone=MappingRule-governs-Adapter、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: MappingRule 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for MappingRule were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: MappingRule の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 映射规则已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: mapping rule was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 写像規則は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 映射测试结果是以如下事实为区分特征的映射信息产物：它是一种 MappingArtifact，记录被测规则、源/目标版本、测试输入、预期与实际输出、exact/lossy/unsupported 分类、往返比较、通过状态、执行时间和证据；它验证规则而不是替代规则。
short_definitions.en: Mapping test result is a mapping artifact; its differentiating condition is that it is a MappingArtifact recording the tested rule, source and target versions, test input, expected and actual output, exact/lossy/unsupported classification, round-trip comparison, pass status, execution time, and evidence.
short_definitions.ja: 写像試験結果は写像情報成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：MappingTestResult は被試験規則・出典／対象版・入力・期待／実出力・exact/lossy/unsupported 分類・往復比較・合否・実行時刻・証拠を記録する MappingArtifact で、規則を検証し代替しません。

definitions.zh: 映射测试结果是以如下事实为区分特征的映射信息产物：它是一种 MappingArtifact，记录被测规则、源/目标版本、测试输入、预期与实际输出、exact/lossy/unsupported 分类、往返比较、通过状态、执行时间和证据；它验证规则而不是替代规则。
definitions.en: Mapping test result is a mapping artifact; its differentiating condition is that it is a MappingArtifact recording the tested rule, source and target versions, test input, expected and actual output, exact/lossy/unsupported classification, round-trip comparison, pass status, execution time, and evidence. It verifies rather than replaces the rule.
definitions.ja: 写像試験結果は写像情報成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：MappingTestResult は被試験規則・出典／対象版・入力・期待／実出力・exact/lossy/unsupported 分類・往復比較・合否・実行時刻・証拠を記録する MappingArtifact で、規則を検証し代替しません。

why_needed.zh: 映射测试结果为canonical 事实 MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning（MappingTestResult reports ConversionWarning）提供明确端点并保持与 ConversionWarning 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: mapping test result provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning (MappingTestResult reports ConversionWarning) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ConversionWarning.
why_needed.ja: 写像試験結果はcanonical 事実 MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning（MappingTestResult reports ConversionWarning）の明確な端点を提供し、ConversionWarning との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的映射测试结果：映射测试结果是以如下事实为区分特征的映射信息产物：它是一种 MappingArtifact，记录被测规则、源/目标版本、测试输入、预期与实际输出、exact/lossy/unsupported 分类、往返比较、通过状态、执行时间和证据；它验证规则而不是替代规则。；该种差可由关系 MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes mapping test result records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Mapping test result is a mapping artifact; its differentiating condition is that it is a MappingArtifact recording the tested rule, source and target versions, test input, expected and actual output, exact/lossy/unsupported classification, round-trip comparison, pass status, execution time, and evidence. It verifies rather than replaces the rule. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす写像試験結果を含みます：写像試験結果は写像情報成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：MappingTestResult は被試験規則・出典／対象版・入力・期待／実出力・exact/lossy/unsupported 分類・往復比較・合否・実行時刻・証拠を記録する MappingArtifact で、規則を検証し代替しません。 種差は関係 MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 转换警告虽与本概念同属 MappingArtifact，但其定义为“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。”，不得替代映射测试结果。
excludes.en: ConversionWarning shares parent MappingArtifact, but its reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.”; it must not be substituted for MappingTestResult.
excludes.ja: ConversionWarning は同じ上位 MappingArtifact を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。」であり、MappingTestResult の代用にはできません。

labels.en: Boundary case for mapping test result
labels.ja: 写像試験結果の境界例

descriptions.zh: ConversionWarning 用作MappingTestResult的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ConversionWarning 的已审查定义是“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。”。不能因 shared parent MappingArtifact 而把它归入MappingTestResult。
descriptions.en: ConversionWarning is the boundary contrast for MappingTestResult. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ConversionWarning's reviewed definition is “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.”. shared parent MappingArtifact does not make it a MappingTestResult.
descriptions.ja: ConversionWarning は MappingTestResult の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ConversionWarning の審査済み定義は「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。」です。shared parent MappingArtifact だけで MappingTestResult にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ConversionWarning 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 MappingTestResult。
expected_result.en: ConversionWarning retains its own type; validation must not promote it to MappingTestResult from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ConversionWarning は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで MappingTestResult へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、MappingTestResult-reports-ConversionWarning の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 MappingTestResult（映射测试结果）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms MappingTestResult (mapping test result) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は MappingTestResult（写像試験結果）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 MappingTestResult 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms MappingTestResult has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は MappingTestResult の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: MappingTestResult 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for MappingTestResult were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: MappingTestResult の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 映射测试结果已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: mapping test result was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 写像試験結果は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 MappingArtifact：MappingTestResult（semantic kind=information，骨架 MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact）；ConversionWarning（semantic kind=information，骨架 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact）。双端条件：MappingTestResult 条件：“映射测试结果是以如下事实为区分特征的映射信息产物：它是一种 MappingArtifact，记录被测规则、源/目标版本、测试输入、预期与实际输出、exact/lossy/unsupported 分类、往返比较、通过状态、执行时间和证据；它验证规则而不是替代规则”；ConversionWarning 条件：“转换警告是一种映射信息产物；其区分条件是：它是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent MappingArtifact: MappingTestResult (semantic kind=information, backbone MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact); ConversionWarning (semantic kind=information, backbone ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact). Endpoint conditions: MappingTestResult condition: “Mapping test result is a mapping artifact; its differentiating condition is that it is a MappingArtifact recording the tested rule, source and target versions, test input, expected and actual output, exact/lossy/unsupported classification, round-trip comparison, pass status, execution time, and evidence”; ConversionWarning condition: “As a mapping artifact, Conversion warning is distinguished by the fact that it is a conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 MappingArtifact：MappingTestResult（semantic kind=information、バックボーン MappingTestResult-is_a-MappingArtifact）；ConversionWarning（semantic kind=information、バックボーン ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact）。両端条件：MappingTestResult の条件：「写像試験結果は写像情報成果物の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：MappingTestResult は被試験規則・出典／対象版・入力・期待／実出力・exact/lossy/unsupported 分類・往復比較・合否・実行時刻・証拠を記録する MappingArtifact で、規則を検証し代替しません」；ConversionWarning の条件：「写像情報成果物に属する変換警告は、次の事実を種差とします：それはアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

descriptions.en: In synthetic run ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter-scenario-001, ConversionWarning explicitly warns about SchemaAdapter; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: A lossy or non-round-trip schema projection is linked to its concrete adapter by a conversion warning.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（warns about）由 adapter-mapping-infrastructure 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由跨模型的对应规则、规则适用条件或对该对应关系的验证证据决定时，在此登记。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter (warns about) is owned by adapter-mapping-infrastructure for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a cross-model correspondence, its applicability conditions, or evidence validating that correspondence.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（warns about）を adapter-mapping-infrastructure が「対象の同一性がモデル間対応、適用条件、またはその対応を検証する証拠で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的 predicate 为 warns_about，方向为 ConversionWarning → SchemaAdapter，relation kind 为 information，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 ConversionWarning→SchemaAdapter、predicate=warns_about、relation kind=information、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter has predicate warns_about, direction ConversionWarning → SchemaAdapter, relation kind information, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction ConversionWarning->SchemaAdapter, predicate=warns_about, relation kind=information, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter の predicate が warns_about、方向が ConversionWarning → SchemaAdapter、relation kind が information、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 ConversionWarning→SchemaAdapter、predicate=warns_about、relation kind=information、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

descriptions.ja: CoverageReport と MappingRule は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「summarizes」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：網羅率報告は exact・lossy・unsupported の写像範囲を要約します。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为summarizes。
expected_result.en: Validation must not classify the object as summarizes.
expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をsummarizesとして分類してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 相关性或共享上位概念不足以证明严格的概念成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: Relatedness or a shared broader concept is insufficient for strict concept membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 関連性または共通の上位概念だけでは、厳密な概念所属を証明できません。
